name: NOV Inc.
summary: NOV Inc. is a global energy technology and equipment provider serving oil and gas companies, service companies, and shipyards. The company supplies drilling equipment including drill pipe, drill bits, liner hangers, completion tools, and land rig packages. NOV also offers closed-loop solids control systems, regenerative power systems, dual-containment flowlines, solar pumping systems, hydrocarbon leak detection systems, gas processing technology, and turret and mooring systems, while expanding into offshore wind, geothermal, carbon capture, and advanced nuclear markets.

products.name: Closed-Loop Solids Control Systems
products.description: Systems that reduce carbon intensity in oil and gas drilling operations.

products.name: Regenerative Power Systems
products.description: Power systems designed to improve efficiency and reduce environmental impact in energy operations.

products.name: Dual-Containment Flowline Technologies
products.description: Flowline systems providing enhanced containment for oil and gas operations.

products.name: Solar Pumping Systems
products.description: Solar-powered pumping solutions for energy operations.

products.name: Hydrocarbon Leak Detection Systems
products.description: Systems for detecting hydrocarbon leaks to reduce environmental impact.

products.name: Drill Pipe and Coatings
products.description: Drill pipe with proprietary coatings used in oil, gas, and geothermal well drilling.

products.name: Drill Bits
products.description: Drill bits used in oil, gas, and geothermal drilling operations.

products.name: Liner Hangers
products.description: Completion tools used in oil, gas, and geothermal well construction.

products.name: Completion Tools
products.description: Tools supporting well completion in oil, gas, and geothermal applications.

products.name: Land Rig Packages
products.description: Full land rig packages used in global drilling operations including geothermal.

products.name: Gas Processing Technology
products.description: Enables CO2-from-hydrocarbon separation, dehydration, and liquification for carbon capture.

products.name: Turret and Mooring Systems
products.description: Offshore production systems that also facilitate offshore carbon re-injection sites.

products.name: Onshore Wind Tower Technology
products.description: Proprietary technology for economically constructing taller onshore wind towers.

partnerships.description: Joint ventures and license arrangements with local nationals in countries with local-preference procurement policies.
